title: MetaView: Monocular Novel View Synthesis with Scale-Aware Implicit Geometry Priors
innovation_summary: MetaView: Monocular Novel View Synthesis with Scale-Aware Implicit Geometry Priors: In this paper, we propose MetaView, a diffusion-based monocular novel view synthesis framework that enables rendering under large view changes from a single image.
